title: Glitches That Know Your Name
visual: Zoom gallery flickers; tiles multiply with Oedi's initials 'OM'; looping system message without sender.
keyEvents: Gallery view flickers and multiplies faces
Looping message: Observation begins. You are part of Zoom 49.

characterArcs.Oedi: Begins sensing reflection rather than error.
characterArcs.Sergio: Frames glitch as reflection, not instability.
characterArcs.Milo: Responds with playful intuition through symbolic GIF.
characterArcs.Bianca: Encourages treating anomaly as analyzable data.
characterArcs.Team: Becomes aware it may be both subject and structure.

title: Awareness of Observation
visual: Slack bursts in Morse-like rhythm; pipelines annotate themselves; #lot-49 posts cryptic signals.
keyEvents: Patterns repeat about the team, not from the team

characterArcs.Oedi: Accepts responsibility within a larger observing structure.
characterArcs.Sergio: Defines self-esteem as stable existence under observation.
characterArcs.Milo: Nervous laughter reveals awareness of meta-pattern.
characterArcs.Felix: Signals transition into meta-layer with commit.
characterArcs.Bianca: Reframes control as presence within limits.

title: The Observer Appears
visual: Phantom Zoom participant named Observer_X joins silently; slides morph into team flowchart.
keyEvents: Slides redraw into flowchart of team
Team recognized as nodes in system

characterArcs.Oedi: Recognizes observation as inherent layer of system.
characterArcs.Piper: Documents phantom presence as recursive evidence.
characterArcs.Team: Begins operating in dual internal and meta-awareness.

title: Recursive Communication
visual: Past messages reappear; GIFs respond to themselves; commits duplicate with slight variation.
keyEvents: Team experiments with influence vs reflection

characterArcs.Oedi: Laughs at recursion; accepts dual-layer existence.
characterArcs.Bianca: Warns that awareness can destabilize or stabilize.

title: The Self-Aware Prototype
visual: Phantom dot returns as AI-like icon; final message declares participants both model and subject.
keyEvents: Phantom dot reappears as AI-like icon
Message: You are both participant and model

characterArcs.Milo: Sees team as both story and authors.
characterArcs.Max: Converts absurdity into symbolic recursive mapping.
